name: Avocado Pear with Crab, Pear, Peach and Primroses
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the avocados and remove the stones.
2. Mix the crab meat with the vinaigrette and fill the avocado halves with this mixture.
3. Peel and slice the pear and peach, then tuck the slices into the crab meat.
4. Decorate the avocados with fresh primroses.
5. Serve immediately with thin filers of toast and butter. (Serves: 4)
